purpose: Make the same-context / same-system / route-before-rebuild invariants MECHANICALLY auditable via hashes, so structural routing cannot be faked and REPEAT-vs-ROUTE is a fair comparison.

signature_pool_hash.must: IDENTICAL across CONTROL, REPEAT, ROUTE and across all centers (context multiset invariant, req 3)

source_frame_hash.must: IDENTICAL across all conditions (no source change)

center_ref_provenance.def: center = index i into signature_pool; record sigs[i]
center_ref_provenance.must: center is an existing pool member; no external text injected; no answer-aware pick

eligibility: a center i is 'eligible/nontrivial' if sigs[i] is distinct from >=1 other signature (degenerate/duplicate signatures excluded from the req-2 tally, reported separately).
audit_procedure: 1. assert signature_pool_hash equal in every condition record.
2. assert source_frame_hash + system_config_hash equal in every condition record.
4. tally route_delta_hash_i != control_delta_hash over eligible centers (req 2).
5. assert ROUTE records show center entered compare (center_ref set) and rebuild got NO repeat_text; REPEAT records show compare center_ref=None and rebuild got repeat_text (req 5).
6. scan ROUTE/REPEAT prompts for forbidden tokens (focus/central/reframe/premise/provenance/challenge/question + HBB-30 answer vocab).
verdict_inputs: req 1,3,4,5 must hold (else INVALID); req 2 pass/fail decides STRUCTURAL vs TEXT-EMPHASIS-ONLY; secondary output-distinguishability decides VALID vs AMBIGUOUS.
